sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87334" key="proeceme/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προεξ-εμέω</orth>, <sense id="n87334.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">vomit before,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philagr.</author> </bibl> ap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:5:22:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.22.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
